Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay, Request For Judicial Notice,Appendix
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY Motion to Stay. Appearances: Emilie C. Woodhead, Esq. of Winston & Strawn LLP (213) 615-1823 appearing for Defendant and Moving party; Barron E. Ramos, Esq. Attorney at Law, (858) 461-0500 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiff and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to stay is granted. Entire action is stayed pending the California Supreme Court's decision in Brinker Restaurant Corp. vs. Superior Court (Hohnbaum) S166350. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Barron Ramos, Esq., appearing by telephone, for for Plaintiff and moving party: Nicola Davis
Emilie Woodhead, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Wells Fargo

After hearing, Plaintiff Nicola Davis's motion to compel production of documents, is taken off calendar, action stayed by order of Judge Woolard. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
